# Telegraphica libwebp subset

This directory contains the decoder-only source subset from libwebp 1.6.0.
Telegraphica builds it as a static portable-C library for OS X 10.9 and does
not use the encoder, tools, examples, or architecture-specific optimizations.

Upstream: https://github.com/webmproject/libwebp/releases/tag/v1.6.0

Source archive SHA-256:
`93a852c2b3efafee3723efd4636de855b46f9fe1efddd607e1f42f60fc8f2136`

The upstream `COPYING` and `PATENTS` files are preserved in this directory.
